must_detect.matched_text:
One access-log cluster requires minimisation: a temporary warehouse operator at Lake Norvale Depot (shift A3) engaged via Hivernis Logistics GmbH, DOB 1990-04-12, residence district Ostmark Sector 7, handheld scanner SNR-AX9-8841 mapped to account twh-042 at Kaster Systems BV.
Other workforce references in this report are generic (e.g., “two night-shift staff under 30” and “blue‑badge contractors”); these do not by themselves identify individuals.
Cross-border transfer: a 48‑hour copy of device logs was processed by Norlandia‑based vendor Galian Processors AS under SCCs and transfer impact assessment VN‑TIA‑2026‑014; telemetry includes IPs and pseudonymous device IDs.
Security content: malware execution blocked; no lateral movement confirmed; samples shared with the CSIRT network; invalid identifiers in sandbox notes (ISIN ZZ0000000000; VAT XX0000000) are placeholders only.
ESG context: CSRD draft disclosures will include downtime KPI and remediation plans; SFDR teams confirm no change to PAI indicators due to absence of customer data loss.
Lawful basis and notice: retention set to 30 days for logs; Art. 33 notification submitted to the Varland DPA; no Art. 34 communication deemed necessary at this stage.
Market abuse controls: a non‑public internal “Scenario R2” capacity impact estimate remains under verification and is handled within MAR workflows pending decision on disclosure.
The internal severity rating in this draft is not a trading signal and relies on assumptions already stated in the public OAM notice; investor relations shall continue to use only published information.
Data subject support uses role mailboxes and helplines only (privacy@orbianterra.eu; +00 800 000 0000); no named contact points are provided here.
Incident tickets reference device aliases and room numbers only (e.g., Dock C‑12, Cart 7B); there are no government ID fields or payment card data in scope.
